description: A content section introducer featuring an H2 eyebrow/label, a large H3 statement heading, and a description paragraph. Used to introduce major content sections on hub and landing pages.

FR-01.title: Eyebrow Label
FR-01.description: The block MUST display an H2 eyebrow label in uppercase that identifies the content category.
acceptance: H2 rendered in Roboto Regular, 700 weight

FR-02.title: Statement Heading
FR-02.description: The block MUST display an H3 large statement heading below the eyebrow.
acceptance: Contains the key message/statement (e.g., 'We solve the tough challenges.')
May include a highlighted keyword with accent styling

FR-03.title: Description Paragraph
FR-03.description: The block MUST display a supporting description paragraph.
acceptance: Provides context for the section content that follows

accessibility.AC-01: Heading hierarchy MUST be logical (H2 before H3)
accessibility.AC-02: Eyebrow text should not rely solely on text-transform: uppercase for meaning
